items.title: Decompile and review APK
items.desc: Use jadx or apktool to inspect source, manifest, and hardcoded secrets.

items.title: AndroidManifest exported components
items.desc: Flag exported activities, services, receivers, and providers without proper permissions.

items.title: Hardcoded API keys and secrets
items.desc: Search decompiled code and resources for keys, tokens, and credentials.

items.title: Insecure local storage
items.desc: Check SharedPreferences, SQLite, and external storage for sensitive data.

items.title: Backup allowed
items.desc: Verify android:allowBackup is false for apps handling sensitive data.

items.title: Debuggable flag
items.desc: Ensure release builds are not debuggable.

items.title: Certificate pinning bypass
items.desc: Test with Frida/objection if traffic can be intercepted via Burp.

items.title: Root detection bypass
items.desc: Attempt to run app on rooted device or emulator with hooks.

items.title: Deep link hijacking
items.desc: Test custom URL schemes and App Links for takeover by malicious apps.

items.title: IPC abuse
items.desc: Use drozer to test content providers and inter-process communication.

items.title: Runtime instrumentation
items.desc: Hook crypto, auth, and SSL routines with Frida.

items.title: Backend API replay
items.desc: Capture and replay mobile API calls in Burp; test IDOR and auth.

items.title: Binary analysis
items.desc: Inspect IPA with class-dump, Hopper, or Ghidra for secrets and logic.

items.title: Info.plist review
items.desc: Check ATS settings, URL schemes, and sensitive plist keys.

items.title: Hardcoded secrets in bundle
items.desc: Search strings and plists for API keys and credentials.

items.title: Jailbreak detection
items.desc: Identify and test bypass of jailbreak/root checks.

items.title: Keychain accessibility
items.desc: Dump keychain with objection; verify kSecAttrAccessible classes.

items.title: SSL pinning bypass
items.desc: Use Frida/objection ios sslpinning disable and proxy traffic.

items.title: Universal link hijacking
items.desc: Test associated domains and URL scheme handlers.

items.title: Sensitive data in logs
items.desc: Monitor device logs during auth and payment flows.

items.title: Backend API security
items.desc: Apply web/API testing to endpoints the app calls.

items.title: Clipboard and screenshot leaks
items.desc: Verify sensitive fields are not copied or captured.
